Local notification.description: Automated alert to local community/neighborhood watch channel.

Police unit.description: Patrol unit dispatched for on-site assessment and crowd/traffic safety.

Traffic control.description: Traffic management team to secure the area and reroute vehicles.

Fire brigade.description: Fire suppression unit for active fire or smoke hazards.

Ambulance.description: Emergency medical transport for injured persons.

Multi-unit fire response.description: Coordinated multi-truck fire response for large-scale fires.

Police command.description: Senior police command unit to coordinate a large-scale response.

Bomb disposal squad.description: Specialist team for suspected explosive devices.

HazMat unit.description: Hazardous materials containment and decontamination team.

Boat unit.description: Boat-equipped unit for flood or coastal incidents.

Urban search and rescue (USAR).description: Structural collapse / trapped-victim search and rescue team.

Structural engineer.description: On-call engineer to assess building/structural safety.

Paramedic team.description: Field paramedic team for mass-casualty or injury-heavy incidents.

Coastal evacuation team.description: Coordinates rapid evacuation of coastal/low-lying areas.

Heavy equipment team.description: Excavators/cranes for landslide or debris clearance.
